zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Cobham於1468年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素時，她的父親Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham33歲，母親Anne Stafford22歲。她於1488年與Edward de Burgh Sir, 2nd Lord of Gainsborough, 11th ggf在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1526年6月26日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Cobham于1468年出生在英国英格兰素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham33岁，母亲Anne Stafford22岁。她于1488年与Edward de Burgh Sir, 2nd Lord of Gainsborough, 11th ggf在英国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1526年6月26日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Cobham was born in 1468, in Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham, was 33 and her mother, Anne Stafford, was 22. She married Edward de Burgh Sir, 2nd Lord of Gainsborough, 11th ggf in 1488, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 26 June 1526, in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Cobham est née en 1468, à Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Anne Stafford, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Edward de Burgh Sir, 2nd Lord of Gainsborough, 11th ggf en 1488, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juin 1526, à Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Cobham 1468 in Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham 33 und ihre Mutter Anne Stafford 22. Sie hat 1488 in England Edward de Burgh Sir, 2nd Lord of Gainsborough, 11th ggf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juni 1526 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Edward de Burgh Sir, 2nd Lord of Gainsborough, 11th ggf nel 1488, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Anne Cobhamが1468年にイギリスイギリススリーステルボロウ カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobhamは33歳，母Anne Staffordは22歳であった。1488年にイギリスでEdward de Burgh Sir, 2nd Lord of Gainsborough, 11th ggfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1526年6月26日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアガインスボロウで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Cobham(이)가 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 스터버루 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Stafford(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1488년 영국에서 Edward de Burgh Sir, 2nd Lord of Gainsborough, 11th ggf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1526년 6월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 게인스버루에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Edward de Burgh Sir, 2nd Lord of Gainsborough, 11th ggf em 1488, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Cobham родилась в 1468 г. в местности стирбороую кастл, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Cobham 5th Baron Cobham было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Stafford, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward de Burgh Sir, 2nd Lord of Gainsborough, 11th ggf в 1488 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 июня 1526 г. в местности геинсбороую, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.
